SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method
No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DID.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test
Factory Target Range Mirror To Target
Factory Target Range Radar To Mirror

DID.NAME: Forward Looking Sensor (FLS) Alignment Process Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Forward Looking Sensor (FLS) Alignment Process Status
Forward Looking Radar (FLR) Heater Relay Status
Forward Looking Camera (FLC) Heater Driver Status
OTA Initiate Download Function in Progress

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: One or More OTA Preconditions Not Met

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Ignition Off Time Required Prior to Accepting InitateActivation of New OTA Software

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Validation Application Routine Not Executed This Session
OTA Over OVTP For Identification Only

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
2nd Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
2nd Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
3rd Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
3rd Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
4th Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
4th Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info

DID.NAME: In-Use OTA Command Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use OTA Command Signing Public Key Hash

DID.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

DID.NAME: OTA ProgrammingSession Entry And A/B Swap Precondition Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Steering Pinsion Torque Out of Range
Engine RPM Too High (or Torque Available)
Park Brake Out of Range or Activation in Progress
Loop-Time overflow or scheduler idle time overflow Counter
Boot Software Version Number- Main Version
Boot Software Version Number- Sub Version
Boot Software Version Number- Release Version

DID.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Component or System Operation Obstructed or Blocked

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #1
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). All operation cycles, including those during which the test was not completed shall be included.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #3
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter first reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). All operation cycles, including those in which the test has not been completed shall be included.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #4
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles during which the DTC fault detection counter reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared).

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_OPERATION_CYCLES_SUPPORTED.DTC_OPERATION_CYCLE: Ends when CCM stops operation Starts when the CCM starts operation and all preconditions mentioned in test run / pass fail criteria are met.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: No Unreasonable radar data reported by IPMA FAIL: Unreasonable radar data reported by IPMA (flag f_Radar_Unreasonable)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Radar Blocked' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Radar Blocked' Event latched.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: - VBattState[VRangeDTC] = NORM_V - Ign_Switch_Stable = STABLE - VehOverGnd_V_Est > 40 kph AND VehOverGnd_V_Est != 0xFFFE AND VehOverGnd_V_Est != 0xFFFF
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: No Blockage detected FAIL: CW Blockage detected OR TD Blockage detected OR Sidelobe Blockage detected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning. Malfunction' Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Unavailable - Front Sensor Blocked" AND If ACC is turned on "Adaptive Cruise Unavailable - Front Sensor Blocked"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Internal temperature within specified range FAIL: Internal temperature too high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Auto alignment (Factory, Service or Drive has converged AND FLR horizontal alignment is within range. FAIL: Auto alignment (Factory, Service or Drive has converged AND FLR horizontal alignment angle is out of range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Factory Alignment passed OR Factory Alignment failed AND Horizontal angle is out of range FAIL: Vertical alignment relative to ground during factory alignment is out side of limits.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Sensor has been successfully aligned through factory or service FAIL: Sensor has not been aligned in factory or in service OR service alignment failed OR factory alignment failed FAIL: (LROS_ModuleCfgVehicleType <> k_VehicleType_default) AND (LROS_ModulePartNumCheck in not 0xFF or 0x00) AND (LROS_ModulePartNumCheck <> LROS_ModuleCfgVehicleType)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Not Available' message when driver attempts to activate feature Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Not Available' Ignition latched

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Private CAN messages from ADAS Module have been received FAIL: Private CAN Communications from ADAS Module have not been received or are corrupted
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Not Available' message when driver attempts to activate feature Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Not Available' Ignition latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Module is correctly configured FAIL: LROS_ModuleCfgVIN = 0x0 (Undefined) OR LROS_ModuleCfgVehicleType = 0x0 (Undefined)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: GCC received correctly FAIL: LROS_CarCfgVIN = 0x0 (Undefined)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: - 5 second delay after FLR ignition on
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Correct checksumm values calculated FAIL: Incorrect checksumm values calculated
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning. Malfunction'.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: - 5 second delay after FLR ignition on
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: No memory faults detected FAIL: Host Stack Overflow Fault OR Host Instruction Set Check Fault
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning. Malfunction'. Ignition latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: - 5 second delay after FLR ignition on
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: No RAM memory failure reported FAIL: RAM area memory failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning. Malfunction'. Ignition latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: No internal electrical failure reported FAIL: internal electrical failure - Further details about the source of this DTC can be found in DID 0xFD02
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning. Malfunction'.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Valid VIN configuration FAIL: LROS_CarCfgVIN <> LROS_ModuleCfgVIN AND LROS_CarCfgVIN <> 0x0 AND LROS_ModuleCfgVIN <> 0x0
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Battery voltage is greater than 9.0 volts FAIL: Battery supply voltage is less than 9.0 volts AND Ignition_Status = "Run" continuously for 8 seconds AND (Speed > 5 kph OR CcStat_D_Actl == Active_QueAssist) AND EIPw_D_Stat <> "LV_Event_In_Progress" AND PwPckTq_D_Stat <> "StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Battery voltage is less than 16.5 volts FAIL: Battery voltage is greater than 16.5 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ACC is disabled and request sent to display 'Driver Intervene' or 'Cruise Malfunction' message. Collision Warning and Mitigation is disabled and request sent to display 'Collision Warning Malfunction'. Event latched
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster Message: "Pre-Collision Assist Not Available" AND If ACC is turned on "Cruise Not Available"

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_D111 did_DD09 did_D117

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: Pin #1 Ignition Pin #4 Ground Pin #2 FLR CAN Low Pin #3 FLR CAN High

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present
